name: blue room
items_start: Blue door with tv camera over it
hints: The blue door has the highest security. Only one clearance level will work.
Only security-level clearance passes this blue door. Visitor and maintenance badges are rejected.
SHOW PICTURE with the security badge. This is the highest security area leading to the control room complex.
SHOW PICTURE with security badge only. Leads to the blue anteroom (room 15) and the control room area.

effects: Message: The door opens just long enough for me to scurry through.

notes: Blue security door - highest clearance required. Only security-level badge works. Leads to the blue anteroom (room 15) giving access to the control room, storage, and reactor core areas.
